title: Amplicon Clean-Up Using SPRI Beads for RAPID Nanopore Kit RBK004
author: Nikki Freed
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bgsrjwd6

steps.title: Vortex SPRI beads thoroughly to ensure...
steps.instruction: Vortex SPRI beads thoroughly to ensure they are well resuspended, the solution should be a homogenous brown colour. Agencourt AMPure XP Beckman Coulter Catalog #A63880

steps.title: Add an equal volume (1:1) of...
steps.instruction: Add an equal volume (1:1) of SPRI beads to the sample tube and mix gently by either flicking or pipetting. For example add 50 µL room temperature SPRI beads to a 50 µL reaction.

steps.title: Pulse centrifuge to collect all liquid...
steps.instruction: Pulse centrifuge to collect all liquid at the bottom of the tube.

steps.title: Place on magnetic rack and incubate...
steps.instruction: Place on magnetic rack and incubate for 00:02:00 or until the beads have pelleted and the supernatant is completely clear.

steps.title: Carefully remove and discard the supernatant,...
steps.instruction: Carefully remove and discard the supernatant, being careful not to touch the bead pellet.

steps.title: Add 200 µL of freshly prepared...
steps.instruction: Add 200 µL of freshly prepared room-temperature 80 % volume ethanol to the pellet.

steps.title: Keeping the magnetic rack on the...
steps.instruction: Keeping the magnetic rack on the benchtop, rotate the bead-containing tube by 180°. Wait for the beads to migrate towards the magnet and re-form a pellet. Remove the ethanol using a pipette and discard.

steps.title: go to step #7 and repeat ethanol wash
steps.instruction: go to step #7 and repeat ethanol wash.

steps.title: Pulse centrifuge to collect all liquid...
steps.instruction: Pulse centrifuge to collect all liquid at the bottom of the tube and carefully remove as much residual ethanol as possible using a P10 pipette.

steps.title: With the tube lid open incubate...
steps.instruction: With the tube lid open incubate for 00:01:00 or until the pellet loses it's shine (if the pellet dries completely it will crack and become difficult to resuspend).

steps.title: Remove the tube from the magnetic rack
steps.instruction: Remove the tube from the magnetic rack. Resuspend pellet in 10 µL 10 mM Tris-HCl pH 8.0 with 50 mM NaCl, mix gently by flicking and incubate at room temperature for 00:02:00 .

steps.title: Place on magnet and transfer sample to a clean 1
steps.instruction: Place on magnet and transfer sample to a clean 1.5mL Eppendorf tube ensuring no beads are transferred into this tube.
